situational_context: Running comeback day 44 (10 runs completed since May 3). Recovery sharply improved overnight: body battery 38→60, training readiness 55→70, HRV BALANCED×2 consecutive days. ACWR 1.35 remains above 1.3 threshold but naturally decaying — high-load Run #9 (suffer 34, Jun 10) exits the 7-day window by Jun 17. Major factor this week: Paris heatwave 30-37°C, peaking Thu-Fri at 35-37°C — all outdoor sessions heat-adapted with reduced HR caps. Sur site Tue+Thu provide natural rest structure. E-bike commuting remains primary modality; running consolidation held at 4 km until ACWR clears 1.2. Weight trend continues downward (102.6 kg, −1.2 kg over 3 weeks). VO2max running improved to 40.6. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due July 2026.

recommendations.text: ACWR 1.35 — continue load consolidation. No additional sessions beyond the 3 planned this week. If either sur site commute is gravel (suffer >25), downgrade the next planned session (Run #11 or Sat ride) to a walk or easy ebike 30 min.

Heatwave week (30-37°C) — all outdoor sessions heat-adapted. HR caps reduced 5-7 bpm below normal. Hydrate ≥500-750 mL per session. Friday Jun 19 (37°C) is mandatory rest. Abort any session if dizziness or cessation of sweating occurs.
recommendations.measurable: No heat-related incidents; all sessions completed or safely aborted

recommendations.text: HRV recovering (37 BALANCED ×2 consecutive days, body battery 60, readiness 70). Do not add load to capitalize on good readiness — priority remains ACWR consolidation. Maintain 7-8h sleep through the hot nights (consider cooling strategies).
recommendations.measurable: HRV 7d avg ≥ 36 ms by end of week; sleep 7d avg ≥ 7.3h despite heat

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains > 1.3 past Wed Jun 17 (Run #9 should exit window)
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.35; natural decay expected as Jun 10 load (34) falls out of acute window

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 33 ms or HRV status returns to LOW for ≥2 consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently recovering (37 BALANCED ×2); heat stress could suppress HRV this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Flag if any session HR exceeds heat-adjusted cap by >5 bpm, or if sleep score drops below 65 for ≥2 nights (heat-disrupted sleep)
markers_to_watch.reason: First heatwave week of the comeback; no heat acclimatization data yet. 102 kg body mass = higher thermal load

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 102 kg body weight
